game.title: EchoClicker
game.subtitle: Eternal Links
game.welcomeCombat: Welcome, Link Weaver! Choose a route on the map to start your adventure.

capture.title: 🔮 Capture Zone
capture.desc: Click to launch Aether Links and capture wild Echoes!

map.title: World Map
map.selectRegionDesc: Click on a region or route on the map to start the adventure.

party.title: Your Party
party.desc: Manage your active Echoes (max 6 in combat)

hatchery.title: Hatchery
hatchery.desc: Combine two compatible Echoes to get an egg!

mine.title: Underground Mine
mine.desc: Dig to find Pure Crystals and treasures!
mine.energyDepletedWait: Mine energy depleted! Wait or buy a recharge.

1.name: Mossling
1.desc: A small ball of moss that rolls aimlessly.

2.name: Leafrix
2.desc: A magical sprout that pulses with green light.

3.name: Sylvaguard
3.desc: A living tree whose roots sing.

4.name: Glimmerfly
4.desc: A magical firefly that lights up the paths.

5.name: Luminara
5.desc: A light fairy that dances between rays.

6.name: Leafwind
6.desc: A living leaf that flies with the wind.

7.name: Cyclorath
7.desc: A conscious whirlwind that sucks everything in.

8.name: Shroomlet
8.desc: A mushroom that releases sleep-inducing spores.

9.name: Toxishroom
9.desc: A giant mushroom whose spores are toxic.

10.name: Songbird
10.desc: A bird whose song heals wounds.

11.name: Shadelet
11.desc: A mini shadow that mimics others' movements.

12.name: Droplet
12.desc: A magical drop of water that never evaporates.

14.name: Glaceling
14.desc: A living block of ice that freezes everything it touches.

15.name: Glacius
15.desc: An ice dragon that creates blizzards.

16.name: Crystaline
16.desc: A small crystal that sings when touched.

17.name: Crystalame
17.desc: A pure crystal entity that refracts light.

19.name: Sparklet
19.desc: A conscious spark that runs on crystals.

20.name: Thunderex
20.desc: A lightning beast that strikes like thunder.

21.name: Rocklett
21.desc: An animated rock that rolls down slopes.

22.name: Mountagnor
22.desc: A living mountain whose steps shake the earth.

23.name: Wavelet
23.desc: A small conscious wave that plays in currents.

24.name: Tsunamis
24.desc: A titanic wave that devours everything.

25.name: Jellyshock
25.desc: A luminous jellyfish that electrocutes its prey.

26.name: Krakos
26.desc: An ancient kraken that rules the abyss.

27.name: Coralblade
27.desc: A living coral that creates protective reefs.

28.name: Sirenlet
28.desc: A playful siren that attracts sailors.

29.name: Arcanette
29.desc: An arcane spark that appears during rituals.

30.name: Chaoslet
30.desc: A mini chaos vortex that distorts the air.

31.name: Ember
31.desc: A living ember that rolls in lava.

32.name: Flammide
32.desc: A conscious flame that consumes everything in its path.

33.name: Infernus
33.desc: A fire demon that makes volcanoes tremble.

34.name: Scorielle
34.desc: A piece of volcanic rock animated by heat.

35.name: Magmior
35.desc: A magma golem that leaves a trail of fire.

36.name: Chaotik
36.desc: A chaotic anomaly that distorts reality.

37.name: Vortexia
37.desc: A pure chaos vortex that absorbs energy.

38.name: Pyrodrak
38.desc: An infernal dragon that spits devouring flames.

39.name: Cendrille
39.desc: A conscious ash cloud that blinds its prey.

41.name: Ombrette
41.desc: An evil shadow that hides among dead trees.

42.name: Spectralis
42.desc: A specter that has haunted the cursed forest for centuries.

43.name: Nuitshade
43.desc: A pure shadow entity that extinguishes all light.

44.name: Morbillon
44.desc: A carnivorous plant corrupted by shadow.

45.name: Viperoak
45.desc: A cursed tree whose branches are serpents.

46.name: Necroflore
46.desc: A death flower that feeds on lost souls.

47.name: Champitox
47.desc: A toxic mushroom whose spores corrupt everything.

48.name: Ombrelune
48.desc: A lunar creature that draws power from the night.

49.name: Spectrillon
49.desc: A small spectral eye that watches from the shadows.

50.name: Creepvine
50.desc: A creeping vine that strangles everything it touches.

51.name: Lumiette
51.desc: A small ball of light that floats in the skies.

52.name: Aurorella
52.desc: A southern light fairy that dances in the sky.

53.name: Seraphiel
53.desc: An angel of light that protects the ethereal skies.

54.name: Zephyrion
54.desc: A wind spirit that flies through the clouds.

55.name: Tempestia
55.desc: A conscious tornado that devastates everything in its path.

56.name: Celestino
56.desc: A small celestial being that brings joy everywhere.

57.name: Nimbus
57.desc: A living cloud that creates storms at will.

58.name: Solarius
58.desc: A living star whose light pierces darkness.

59.name: Ailedevent
59.desc: A storm bird that soars above the clouds.

60.name: Eclairoz
60.desc: A divine spark that blinds enemies.

61.name: Arcafox
61.desc: An arcane fox whose tail glows with magic.

62.name: Mystigard
62.desc: A mystical guardian that protects arcane secrets.

63.name: Archanos
63.desc: An arcane archmage whose power transcends reality.

64.name: Cristalite
64.desc: A conscious crystal that refracts ambient magic.

65.name: Prismatik
65.desc: A living prism that decomposes light into rainbows.

66.name: Runestone
66.desc: A runic stone engraved with ancient magical symbols.

67.name: Cristallus
67.desc: A crystal dragon whose scales shine with pure magic.

68.name: Arcanexus

quests.title: 📋 Quests
quests.desc: Complete quests to earn rewards and progress in your adventure!

intro.title: ⚡ Introduction
intro.desc1: Welcome to the world of EchoClicker!
intro.desc2: In this guide, you will learn how routes work.
intro.captureDesc: Use your Aether Links to capture wild Echoes.
intro.fightDesc: Fight Echoes on routes to gain experience.
intro.evolveDesc: Train your Echoes to reach new levels.
intro.collectDesc: Fill your logbook by discovering all Echoes.

hatchery.title: 🥚 Hatchery System (Incubator)
hatchery.desc: The incubator allows you to breed two Echoes.
hatchery.step1: Select two parents from your party or reserves.
hatchery.step2: Make sure you have a free incubation slot (max 4).
hatchery.step3: Start the incubation. Time depends on rarity.
hatchery.step4: Collect your new Echo once incubation is complete!

routes.title: 🗺️ Map & Routes
routes.desc: The world is divided into several regions.

types.title: 🌀 Type Chart
types.desc: Each Echo has a type that determines its strengths and weaknesses.

echoes.title: 📖 Echo Encyclopedia
echoes.desc: Complete list of all known Echoes in the current region.
